customdiscs.gui.hint: Paste the full path to a .ogg file
customdiscs.gui.need_blank: Requires a blank Custom Disc (press an Unassembled Disc first)!
customdiscs.status.error_file: File not found or not a .ogg file!
item.customdiscs.unassembled_disc.desc: Press with a Mechanical Press, then use in the Disc Recorder
_comment_ponder: Ponder scene overlay texts (auto-keyed by scene ID + text index)
customdiscs.ponder.disc_crafting.text_1: Combine a Brass Sheet and a Sturdy Sheet in a crafting table
customdiscs.ponder.disc_crafting.text_2: The result is an Unassembled Disc — it needs to be pressed into shape
customdiscs.ponder.disc_crafting.text_3: Place the Unassembled Disc under a Create Mechanical Press and power it
customdiscs.ponder.disc_crafting.text_4: The press shapes it into a blank Custom Disc — ready to be encoded with music
customdiscs.ponder.disc_recording.text_1: Place a Disc Recorder and right-click to open its interface
customdiscs.ponder.disc_recording.text_2: Make sure you have a blank Custom Disc in your inventory before recording
customdiscs.ponder.disc_recording.text_3: Enter the path to an OGG audio file on your computer, or use the Browse button
customdiscs.ponder.disc_recording.text_4: Give the track a title, optionally adjust volume, then click Cut Disc
customdiscs.ponder.disc_recording.text_5: Insert the encoded disc into a Jukebox — music plays with 3D proximity audio via Simple Voice Chat!
item.customdiscs.station_marker.desc: Define the announcement zone for a Train Speaker
